title: Preparation of 6M Guanidine Isothiocyanate (GITC) Solution
author: Jacquelina.Woods
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bybbpsin
materials: Aseptically mix 7.09 g Guanidine Isothiocyanate Thermo Fisher Catalog #15535016 in sterile distilled or ultrapure water to 4.5 mL

steps.title: Adjust total volume
steps.instruction: Bring total volume up to 10 mL with additional sterile distilled or ultrapure water

steps.title: Store solution
steps.instruction: Store at Room temperature in the dark (or in light occluding tube) Solution is only stable for 1 month after preparation.
